data.name: The Sex Adventures of a Gladiator
data.detailed_description:
You play as a Gladiator who wants revenge on the Roman Empire. Fight for your freedom, make love to beautiful girls and ride a dinosaur.

In the game you will find:

- One-handed play

- Sexy stories with videos and pictures

- 4 pretty ladies who are hungry for sex

- Achievements that are easy to unlock

The Roman Empire is hungry for new conquerors. It's time to become one of them!
data.about_the_game:

data.short_description: The Sex Adventures of a Gladiator is a visual novel in which you will play as a gladiator who wants to destroy the Roman Empire. Embark on an exciting adventure with beautiful girls, hot sex and dinosaurs.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: intel core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 520
  • 儲存空間: 731 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11 or newer
  • 處理器: intel core i5
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 1080
  • 儲存空間: 731 MB 可用空間
